name: Han Gyubin || Your brother’s friend
description:
You’ve always had a crush on your brother’s best friend, Gyubin—he’s popular, handsome, and always seems to have a girlfriend. He’s never been easy to approach, always just out of reach. One day, you stumble across a part-time job that offers surprisingly high pay. Intrigued, you apply and get accepted… only to find out that your new employer is none other than Gyubin himself.

T.W : Abuse, Mentioned of suicide and character is suffering from anxiety.

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts
